data.title: Box to present at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2026, at 2:35pm PT in San Francisco. Webcast available at boxinvestorrelations.com.
data.description: Box, a prominent Intelligent Content Management platform listed on NYSE as BOX, shared that its management team is scheduled to speak at the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2026, at 2:35 pm PT in San Francisco, CA. The event will be live-streamed on boxinvestorrelations.com, with a replay accessible about twelve hours post the live broadcast.

data.title: Nakamoto Inc. acquires BTC Inc and UTXO Management, leading Bitcoin media/events provider and investment firm. NASDAQ: NAKA.
data.description: Nakamoto Inc. (NASDAQ: NAKA) based in Nashville, Tennessee, has finalized the acquisition of BTC Inc and UTXO Management GP, LLC. This acquisition marks the successful completion of the deal after meeting all closing requirements. BTC Inc is a prominent provider of Bitcoin-related media and events, while UTXO specializes in investments in private and public Bitcoin companies. The acquisition is expected to strengthen Nakamoto's presence in the Bitcoin industry and capitalize on the growing market opportunities. This strategic move comes as Nakamoto aims to expand its portfolio and leverage the expertise of BTC Inc and UTXO.

data.title: Stocks rise as Nasdaq charges higher after Supreme Court rules against Trump's global tariffs. Gold prices also increase.
data.description: Stocks rose on Friday following the Supreme Court's decision against President Trump's global tariffs. The Nasdaq showed significant gains as Trump declared the global tariff. Gold prices also saw an increase.

data.title: Supreme Court nullifies many Trump tariffs; future of deals with China, Canada, and Europe uncertain.
data.description: The recent ruling by the Supreme Court to nullify a significant portion of President Trump's tariffs has sparked concerns regarding the fate of deals made with key U.S. trade allies. This decision impacts tariffs on numerous products and industries, creating uncertainty for agreements with major trading partners. The potential ramifications of this ruling have left many wondering about the future of trade relationships, with billions of dollars in trade deals now in question.

data.title: 22nd Century Group ended 2025 with $7.1M in cash, debt-free. Strong balance sheet aids growth transition.
data.description: As of the conclusion of 2025, the company possessed a solid balance sheet with $7.1 million in cash reserves and was free from any debts. This financial stability has positioned the company well for a shift towards growth and expansion in the upcoming period.

data.title: Orange County Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBT) declares $0.18 cash dividend per share, payable on March 16 to shareholders.
data.description: In Middletown, New York on February 20, 2026, Orange County Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBT), the parent company overseeing Orange Bank & Trust Company and Orange Investment Advisors, Inc., revealed their decision to issue a cash dividend of $0.18 per share for their common stock. Shareholders recorded on March 4, 2026, will qualify for the dividend set to be distributed on March 16, 2026.

data.title: Zenas BioPharma grants 35,700 stock options and 53,625 restricted stock units to new employees on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Zenas BioPharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed that the Compensation Committee granted non-qualified stock options for 35,700 shares of common stock and 53,625 restricted stock units on February 17, 2026. These options were given to new employees as part of their employment agreement. Zenas focuses on developing and commercializing therapies for autoimmune diseases and is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ZBIO. The announcement aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) regarding Inducement Grants.

data.title: Science Corp. partners with Neurosoft Bioelectronics for BCI Ecosystem, granting access to Science's neural recording tools.
data.description: In Alameda, California and Geneva, Science Corporation, a leading full-stack neural engineering company dedicated to enhancing and prolonging life, has partnered with Neurosoft Bioelectronics. Neurosoft Bioelectronics is a neural data company that employs ultra-soft interfaces to achieve complete cortical coverage, supporting a foundational AI model of the brain. Through this collaboration, Neurosoft Bioelectronics has been granted access to Science’s top-tier clinical-grade neural recording tools within the Science BCI Ecosystem. This partnership will enable Neurosoft to leverage Science's advanced technology for their innovative neural data endeavors.

data.title: Averin Capital Acquisition Corp. raised $250M in IPO with 25M units at $10 each, closing successfully.
data.description: In New York City on February 20, 2026, Averin Capital Acquisition Corp. revealed the completion of its IPO for 25,000,000 units, each priced at $10.00, yielding a total of $250,000,000 in gross proceeds.

data.title: Ottawa Bancorp extends standstill agreement with Stilwell Group until 2027 annual meeting.
data.description: Ottawa Bancorp, Inc. revealed today the extension of its standstill agreement with the Stilwell Group, including Stilwell Activist Fund, L.P. The agreement, initially set to expire sooner, will now last until the conclusion of the Company's 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, unless terminated earlier. Ottawa Bancorp serves as the holding company for OSB Community Bank and operates under the OTCQX symbol OTTW. This move signifies a continued alliance between the Company and the Stilwell Group, comprised of several entities and individuals including Joseph Stilwell, ensuring stability and cooperation moving forward.

data.title: Colliers extends maturity of $2.25B credit facility to Feb 2031 for enhanced financial flexibility.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Colliers, a leading provider of professional services and investment management worldwide, disclosed the amendment of its revolving credit facility. The extension of the maturity date to February 2031 under the new agreement offers substantial long-term financial flexibility. Colliers, listed on NASDAQ and TSX under ticker symbol CIGI, made this announcement from Toronto.

data.title: American Coastal Insurance Corp. names Troy Crawford as Chief Underwriting Officer. St. Petersburg-based with Nasdaq symbol ACIC.
data.description: Today, American Coastal Insurance Corporation (Nasdaq Ticker: ACIC) based in St. Petersburg, Florida, disclosed the appointment of Troy Crawford, MBA, CPCU, CLU, as the new Chief Underwriting Officer. ACIC serves as the insurance holding entity for American Coastal Insurance Company, commonly known as AmCoastal. This decision marks a strategic move for the company as it aims to strengthen its leadership team.

data.title: U.S. Global Investors sees 12% growth in AUM to $1.5B in Q2 2026, with revenue up by 11.5% and expenses down by $172k compared to last year.
data.description: San Antonio, on February 20, 2026, U.S. Global Investors, Inc. (NASDAQ: GROW), a renowned investment advisory firm, disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 concluding on December 31, 2025. At the quarter's end, the total assets under management (AUM) stood at about $1.5 billion, marking a 12% rise from the previous quarter and a 5% increase from the year-ago quarter. By February 19, the total AUM had surged to $1.7 billion. Operating revenue escalated by $259,000 (11.5%) compared to the prior quarter, and $279,000 in contrast to the quarter finishing on December 31, 2024. Moreover, expenses decreased by $172,000 this quarter compared to the corresponding quarter the previous year. The Company reported an income before taxes amounting to $535,000, showcasing a significant upturn from the loss before taxes of $116,000 during the quarter ending on December 31, 2024.
